'''ngafuzhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:bdellin|bdellin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-f-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:bdellin|bdellin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| ngafuzhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæfizhith|ngæfizhith]] || [[word:ngæfizhij|ngæfizhij]] || [[word:ngæfizhish|ngæfizhish]] || [[word:ngæfizhi|ngæfizhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngafufuzhuth|ngafufuzhuth]] || [[word:ngafufuzhuj|ngafufuzhuj]] || [[word:ngafufuzhush|ngafufuzhush]] || [[word:ngafufuzhu|ngafufuzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngafuzhuth|ngafuzhuth]] || [[word:ngafuzhuj|ngafuzhuj]] || [[word:ngafuzhush|ngafuzhush]] || [[word:ngafuzhu|ngafuzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngafufzhuth|ngafufzhuth]] || [[word:ngafufzhuj|ngafufzhuj]] || [[word:ngafufzhush|ngafufzhush]] || [[word:ngafufzhuf|ngafufzhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngafuzhuthu|ngafuzhuthu]] || [[word:ngafuzhuju|ngafuzhuju]] || [[word:ngafuzhushu|ngafuzhushu]] || [[word:ngafuzhuku|ngafuzhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngafuzhuth|ngafuzhuth]] || [[word:ngafuzhuj|ngafuzhuj]] || [[word:ngafuzhush|ngafuzhush]] || [[word:ngafuzhu|ngafuzhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngafuzhuthul|ngafuzhuthul]] || [[word:ngafuzhujul|ngafuzhujul]] || [[word:ngafuzhushul|ngafuzhushul]] || [[word:ngafuzhukul|ngafuzhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngafuzhuthuthu|ngafuzhuthuthu]] || [[word:ngafuzhujuju|ngafuzhujuju]] || [[word:ngafuzhushushu|ngafuzhushushu]] || [[word:ngafuzhuku|ngafuzhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngafuzhuthun|ngafuzhuthun]] || [[word:ngafuzhujun|ngafuzhujun]] || [[word:ngafuzhushun|ngafuzhushun]] || [[word:ngafuzhukun|ngafuzhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngafuzhuthuoro|ngafuzhuthuoro]] || [[word:ngafuzhujuoro|ngafuzhujuoro]] || [[word:ngafuzhushuoro|ngafuzhushuoro]] || [[word:ngafuzhukuoro|ngafuzhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
